title: SUPPORTIVE EMPLOYMENT - 211info
text: PHOENIX WELLNESS CENTER SUPPORTIVE EMPLOYMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides help with job searching, assistance with training/training costs, resume building, job interview skill building, job development, on-the-job visitation, job coaching, transportation, and consultation with the employer. 145 N Coast Highway Unit B Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Individuals with a past or present substance use disorder diagnosis Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm Saturday 8am-5pm Email (541) 272-5048 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 272-5048 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lincoln County Services: Comprehensive Job Assistance Centers * Substance Use Disorder Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - PHOENIX WELLNESS CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PHOENIX WELLNESS CENTER
